chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP No.D–2948 of 2025 ________________________________________________ DATE: ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(s) OF JUDGE(s) ________________________________________________ 1. For order on office objection No.1 to 4 2. For hearing of CMA No.13050/2025 3. For hearing of main case 21-07-2025 Qazi Hifzur Rehman, Advocate for Petitioner Mr. K.A. Waswani, AAG Mr. Mansoor Ahmed, Assistant Registrar Cooperative Societies-VI --------------- Both Counsel are agreed for the disposal of instant Petition that Registrar Cooperative Societies may be directed to start the process for conducting elections of the Society i.e. Muslimabad Cooperative Housing Society Limited, and complete the same within a period of one month. In the above terms, this Petition is disposed of along with pending application. The Petitioner is directed to cooperate with the Registrar Cooperative Societies for conducting the elections fairly. JUDGE JUDGE FAIZAN/
